race.comment: TALLEYRAND (5) debuted two weeks ago when he finished ninth over 1200m at Toowoomba. Much better for that run and can get off the mark this time. OUTDOOR CAT (7) returns from a spell of five months and is having her first run for a new yard. Finished fourth at this track over 1000m when first-up last time in work. Will be forward for this after a recent trial win at Dalby. Expect her to pose a serious challenge. RUN ZIGGY RUN (10) is a three-year-old filly on debut from the stable of Glenn Richardson. By Killy from One In One Out. Trialling in good style and looks forward enough. Expect a bold run. COLINTON (1) returned from a spell two weeks ago when he was fourth over 1200m at Kilcoy. Fitter so expect a better run this time. WEATHER (3) looks a genuine hope first-up.
